subsequent_tick_wire: a19_v2_encode_with_dict / a19_v2_decode_with_dict + a19_v2_encode_with_header / a19_v2_decode_with_header (corpus-dict parameterized, NOT per-file dict rebuild)
escape_marker: sigil + escape_byte → literal sigil byte in source
reference_format: sigil + chr(idx_byte) where idx_byte ∈ {1..127} \ {26, 94} = 125 distinct values
utf8_constraint_disclosed: hexa chr() returns UTF-8 sequence; chr(0) is empty string, chr(128..255) is 2 bytes. EFFECTIVE A19_V2_DICT_CAP=125 (NOT design 256). Idx-to-byte mapping skips reserved bytes 26 and 94 to avoid sigil/escape collision.
body_format: raw bytes (NOT base64) — preserves 1-byte sigil + 1-byte ref efficiency
raw_142_d2_try_and_revert: a19_v2_encode_with_header reverts to identity if len(header+body) >= len(raw)
